query:
UPDATE clients
        SET 
            name = COALESCE(?, name),
            phone = COALESCE(?, phone),
            email = COALESCE(?, email),
            address = COALESCE(?, address),
            color = COALESCE(?, color),
            tags = COALESCE(?, tags),
            notes = COALESCE(?, notes),
            updated_at = ?
        WHERE id = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
